response.global_analysis: Audio features a mix of dialogue (English/Japanese) and song performance ('Suteki na Nichiyoubi'). The audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON lyrics, which I am using to confirm the correct Japanese transcription and intended English meaning. I am strictly following the audio waveform for timestamps, ensuring each subtitle block is tightly wrapped around vocal bursts, especially during the fast-paced 'Gyu' repetitions and Kobo's baby talk. I have split sentences where pauses occur to maintain synchronization.

subtitles.original: Well, you're very like...
...アイドルみたい、可愛い、可愛いこぼ、でしょ？
Mori Calliope needs a little bit of work though.
subtitles.english: Mori Calliope needs a little bit of work though.

subtitles.original: And what is wrong? I need to talk to that curse.
subtitles.english: And what is wrong? I need to talk to that curse.

subtitles.original: I will visit whoever did this to you now,
subtitles.english: I will visit whoever did this to you now,

subtitles.original: and I will ボコボコ their ass.
subtitles.english: and I'll beat the crap out of them.

subtitles.original: So keep yapping while I... I'm gonna get out of here.
subtitles.english: So keep yapping while I... I'm gonna get out of here.

subtitles.original: My work here's done. 頑張れ、頑張れ！
subtitles.english: My work here's done. Good luck! Good luck!
